creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
databases/tdb port depends on python only for python bindings, and could be used without python at all.
	As net/samba35 depends on databases/tdb, it pulls python to any server with samba35 installed.
	samba35 could be used on servers with limited system space, like flash-booted NASes, which doesn't need python at all.

	This update make databases/tdb dependency on python optional (but turned on by default).
